positive: Central symmetrical illustration of a cosmic botanical arrangement featuring stylized bioluminescent ferns, swirling nebula dust, and exotic, symmetrical lotus flowers. The style is neo-art nouveau mixed with ethereal space aesthetics. High contrast, deep indigo blues and vibrant luminous cyan accents against an inky black background. Crisp line work, perfect symmetry, intricate negative space, ideal for screen printing on dark apparel. Clean silhouette, vibrant pop-art color grading, volumetric lighting, ultra detailed, graphic design, vector illustration.
